# STEP 1: IDENTIFICATION OF CANDIDATE MODEL PATHOGENS FOR CHENOPODIUM PALLIDICAULE

## OBJECTIVE
Identify candidate model pathogens based on pathogenicity to Chenopodium species and suitability as model systems, considering: (1) ease of culture, (2) genetic tractability, (3) relevance to natural disease pressures.
